class_track_moves_reference_check.name: class_track_moves_reference_check
class_track_moves_reference_check.value:
(("class_track_moves"."move_id" is not null) + ("class_track_moves"."user_move_id" is not null)) <= 1
        and ("class_track_moves"."move_id" is not null or "class_track_moves"."user_move_id" is not null or "class_track_moves"."name_override" is not null)
